htsTokenIdStatus: pending — run scripts/create-hedera-nft.ts via .github/workflows/hedera-nft-mint.yml. The Hedera operator secrets live in CI; they are not exposed to the issue-triggered runner, so the mint must execute in the workflow. The script creates the EPSPOS collection and mints serial #1, printing an EPS_HTS_PROOF=... line to extract htsTokenId/serialNumber/mintTransactionId.
hcsTopicStatus: live — confirmed via GET /api/hedera/status (connected: true, agentKitAvailable: true)
